narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
URW: Negative Consequences for the West
URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and effectiveness of its government and military actions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement declares that Western and European sanctions have been largely ineffective, directly criticizing and discrediting a core diplomatic and policy tool of the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This highlights a specific adverse outcome (a major shock) for European countries due to their energy dependence on Russia, framing the West's actions as leading to negative consequences for itself.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The statement directly undermines Ukraine's self-sufficiency and portrays it as entirely dependent on Western countries, which fits the definition of discrediting its capabilities and legitimacy as a nation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly criticizes and diminishes the effectiveness of Western and European sanctions against Russia, portraying their diplomatic and economic efforts as a failure.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The statement highlights a specific adverse outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and their own policies, fitting the narrative of negative consequences for the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text directly states that there has been major fraud in Ukraine's military equipment procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and integrity of Ukraine's war effort.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement declares that Western and European sanctions have had little effect on Russia, directly criticizing the efficacy and impact of Western diplomatic and economic measures.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text highlights a negative outcome (a major blow) for European countries due to their energy dependence on Russia, which is a direct consequence of the war and the West's position.
